# registry_provider_record (Resource)

Manages a registry provider record. Provider binaries are uploaded separately.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "registry_provider_record" "example" {
  organization_id = registry_organization.example.id
  namespace       = "my-org"
  type            = "example"
  description     = "Example Terraform provider"
  source          = "https://github.com/my-org/terraform-provider-example"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `namespace` (String) Namespace for the provider.
- `organization_id` (String) UUID of the organization that owns this provider.
- `type` (String) Provider type (e.g., 'aws', 'azurerm', 'google').

### Optional

- `description` (String) Optional description of the provider.
- `source` (String) Optional source repository URL.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) ISO 8601 timestamp when the provider record was created.
- `created_by` (String) UUID of the user who created this provider record.
- `id` (String) UUID of the provider record.
- `updated_at` (String) ISO 8601 timestamp when the provider record was last updated.
